text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm hm hm! ♪ Now where are they? Maybe they're already here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen upon Matikanetannhauser on a weekend stroll through the
park.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Out for a bit of fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well ain't that a coinkydink! I'm here waiting for some friends myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ah, there they are now! Everyone! Hey there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look in the direction she's waving and see a bunch of grinning
kids quickly approaching.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Girl
text_block_list.text: Hi there, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Active Boy
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Machi! What you got planned for us today? Cops and robbers?
Tag? I'm pretty fast, so I'm good for anything!
choice_data_list: (The friends she mentioned are all these kids?)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see then... How about some tag in that case? Get ready! Rock,
paper, scissors, pyoi!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Looks like I'm "it"! I'm gonna getcha, so you better get runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to feel exhausted, and I'm just watching. Even after wrapping
up their game, Matikanetannhauser looks no less energetic than when
she started.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whew, now that was some serious fun! I hope everyone's gotten home
okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kids have all gone home for lunch, leaving just myself and
Tannhauser in the park.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Geh, that's right! Lunchtime! No goodie good—I almost forgot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh ho ho, piqued your curiosity, have I? Would you like to tag along,
then? We could go halfsies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow behind until we arrive at the shopping street. It's unusually
crowded today, and the air is filled with excited shouts and the echo
of handbells.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Howdy there! I would like to give your raffle a shot, ma'am. I have
tons of tickets!
choice_data_list: (I see now. There's a raffle promotion going on.)

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Machitan! Pep in your step like always, I see! Step on
over here for the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: I knew we'd be seein' ya today, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see how many tickets you've got there... Haha, you're one
of our best customers all right! Come and pull as much as your sweet
little heart wants!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are dozens of decorated boxes lined up on a table set up for
the event. Matikanetannhauser reaches her hand into one of them
and pulls a lot.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Here goooooes!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text:
Let's see here... Oof, it's fourth tier. Too bad, but you do get to pick
a candy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mumu. I'm really after that Arach-kid costume, so there's no stopping
here. Plenty more tickets where that came from. I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All righty, here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Darn, fourth tier again. Go ahead and pick another candy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh? Another fourth tier. No worries, though! Again, again, again!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: How's about this?!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: Too bad. Fourth tier.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Next! Take that!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: Too bad! Another fourth tier for you!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: Just one ticket left... What'll it be, Machitan?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... pant... Gulp. Yeah, okay. Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Lady
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, dear! You can do it! I believe!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text:
She's right! There's no way you're losin' out now after all those pulls.
You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You guys... Thank you! This one's for all the marbles... Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Eeeeei!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The final lot is drawn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's fourth tier.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Sorry, Trainer. I was planning on going halfsies with you on the Arach-kid costume and everything...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait, now that I think about it, how exactly would that work? Oh well!
Why don't we head back?

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait right there, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text:
Here's a little something for your persistence. There's enough ice
cream in there for the two of ya, so go ahead and split it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really? That's so nice! Thanks, pops. I'll be back again soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Tannhauser waves goodbye to all of the people at the shopping
street, I can tell that she hasn't lost a single ounce of her cheerful
spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the gym early the next day to make sure our equipment is
ready for our scheduled strength training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ei, mun! Ei, mun! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it seems that Tannhauser has beaten me there by what looks like
a good deal of time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! Should I hit the treadmill next? Or maybe the
dumbbells? I think I can hear those barbells calling my name too.
choice_data_list: Yesterday's not weighing you down, eh?
Yesterday's not weighing you down, eh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, not at all! I bet I could bench that weight, actually. Mun!
choice_data_list: Was it good to see all your friends yesterday?
Was it good to see all your friends yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I always feel like I get a full charge after playing with the
kids and doing a bit of shopping.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I can't wait 'til next weekend. Wonder what we'll play? Hm hm
hm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser can make friends with almost anyone she meets,
and those connections seem to give her all the energy she could ever
need.
